name: CreateMenuEntryResponse
description: Class used specifically as response body when creating a menu entry

type.name: type
type.description: Menu Entry type. Values : FOLDER, MENU_PAGE or EXTERNAL_PAGE

url.name: url
url.description: Menu Entry url, present if menu entry type is MENU_PAGE or EXTERNAL_PAGE

target.name: target
target.description: Menu Entry target, present if menu entry type is MENU_PAGE or EXTERNAL_PAGE
